proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_056=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with feature_056=0.
Patients with feature_042=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with feature_042=0.
Patients with feature_048=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with feature_048=0.
Patients with feature_111=1 have higher mean pfs_months than patients with feature_111=0.
Patients with feature_015=1 have lower mean pfs_months than patients with feature_015=0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS feature_056=1: 3.617 (n=14969); feature_056=0: 5.153 (n=35031); Welch t-test diff=-1.536 months, p=0.00e+00
Mean PFS feature_042=1: 5.408 (n=17428); feature_042=0: 4.310 (n=32572); Welch t-test diff=1.098 months, p=0.00e+00
Mean PFS feature_048=1: 3.750 (n=5090); feature_048=0: 4.800 (n=44910); Welch t-test diff=-1.050 months, p=1.45e-178
Mean PFS feature_111=1: 4.865 (n=34886); feature_111=0: 4.297 (n=15114); Welch t-test diff=0.568 months, p=3.70e-143
Mean PFS feature_015=1: 4.328 (n=17365); feature_015=0: 4.887 (n=32635); Welch t-test diff=-0.559 months, p=6.07e-144

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_080 (continuous) is positively correlated with pfs_months.
feature_067 (continuous) is negatively correlated with pfs_months.
feature_019 (continuous) is positively correlated with pfs_months.
feature_101 (continuous) is negatively correlated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Spearman correlation feature_080 vs pfs_months: r=0.726, p=0.00e+00
Spearman correlation feature_067 vs pfs_months: r=-0.116, p=4.77e-149
Spearman correlation feature_019 vs pfs_months: r=0.102, p=1.40e-115
Spearman correlation feature_101 vs pfs_months: r=-0.083, p=8.06e-77

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_063 (3-level ordinal) is associated with pfs_months: higher levels correspond to lower pfs_months.
The 5-level ordinals feature_021, feature_024, feature_127, feature_001, feature_073 are associated with pfs_months.
feature_011 (race; categorical asian/black/hispanic/other/white) is associated with pfs_months.
feature_089 (insurance; medicaid/medicare/private/uninsured) is associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_063 ordinal effect: ANOVA F=2860.7 p=0.00e+00; Spearman r=-0.334 (mean PFS 5.64/4.44/3.29 across levels 0/1/2).
feature_021: ANOVA F=0.542 p=7.051e-01 (no detectable association)
feature_024: ANOVA F=0.700 p=5.920e-01 (no detectable association)
feature_127: ANOVA F=0.634 p=6.382e-01 (no detectable association)
feature_001: ANOVA F=0.378 p=8.246e-01 (no detectable association)
feature_073: ANOVA F=1.292 p=2.704e-01 (no detectable association)
feature_011 race ANOVA: F=0.849 p=0.494 (group means asian 4.74, black 4.72, hispanic 4.71, other 4.76, white 4.68 - no significant disparity).
feature_089 insurance ANOVA: F=0.310 p=0.818 (medicaid 4.71, medicare 4.69, private 4.68, uninsured 4.73 - no significant disparity).

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_080 retains a positive effect on pfs_months after adjusting for all other features in a single OLS model.
feature_063 retains a negative effect on pfs_months after adjustment.
feature_056, feature_048, feature_040, feature_015 retain independent negative effects on pfs_months after adjustment.
feature_042 and feature_111 retain independent positive effects on pfs_months after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: OLS adjusted coef for feature_080 = 0.1757 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_063 = -1.1714 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_056 = -1.5492 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_048 = -0.9819 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_040 = -0.4706 months (p=9.32e-239); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_015 = -0.5822 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_042 = 1.1008 months (p=0.00e+00); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.
OLS adjusted coef for feature_111 = 0.5314 months (p=3.81e-274); model R^2=0.7927 on N=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for feature_080 and feature_063, mean pfs_months differs across feature_011 (race) categories - particularly, non-white groups have shorter pfs_months than white patients.

After adjusting for feature_080 and feature_063, mean pfs_months differs across feature_089 (insurance) categories - particularly, medicaid and uninsured patients have shorter pfs_months than private-insured patients.

analyses.result_summary: Race='black' (vs reference 'asian'): adjusted coef=-0.0124 months, p=0.729 - no statistically significant disparity.
Race='hispanic' (vs reference 'asian'): adjusted coef=-0.0020 months, p=0.954 - no statistically significant disparity.
Race='other' (vs reference 'asian'): adjusted coef=-0.0178 months, p=0.759 - no statistically significant disparity.
Race='white' (vs reference 'asian'): adjusted coef=-0.0204 months, p=0.503 - no statistically significant disparity.
Insurance='medicare' (vs reference 'medicaid'): adjusted coef=-0.0208 months, p=0.346 - no statistically significant disparity.
Insurance='private' (vs reference 'medicaid'): adjusted coef=-0.0299 months, p=0.179 - no statistically significant disparity.
Insurance='uninsured' (vs reference 'medicaid'): adjusted coef=-0.0014 months, p=0.973 - no statistically significant disparity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse effect of feature_056 on pfs_months is amplified at higher values of feature_080 (negative interaction coefficient).
The favorable effect of feature_042 on pfs_months is reduced at higher values of feature_080 (negative interaction coefficient).
feature_080 modifies the effect of feature_048 on pfs_months (interaction term significant).
feature_080 modifies the effects of feature_111, feature_040, and feature_015 on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_080 x feature_056: coef=-0.0112 months/unit (p=3.13e-12).
Interaction feature_080 x feature_042: coef=-0.0032 months/unit (p=4.38e-02).
Interaction feature_080 x feature_048: coef=-0.0076 months/unit (p=3.51e-03).
Interaction feature_080 x feature_111: coef=-0.0014 months/unit (p=4.07e-01).
Interaction feature_080 x feature_040: coef=0.0017 months/unit (p=4.10e-01).
Interaction feature_080 x feature_015: coef=0.0017 months/unit (p=3.11e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of feature_056 on pfs_months is amplified at higher levels of feature_063 (negative interaction).
feature_063 interacts with feature_042, feature_048, feature_111, and feature_040 in modifying their effect on pfs_months.

analyses.code: OLS y ~ feature_063 + feature_056 + feature_063 * feature_056
analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_063 x feature_056: coef=0.0665 (p=4.033e-02).

analyses.code: OLS y ~ feature_063 + feature_042 + feature_063 * feature_042
analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_063 x feature_042: coef=0.0091 (p=7.746e-01).

analyses.code: OLS y ~ feature_063 + feature_048 + feature_063 * feature_048
analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_063 x feature_048: coef=0.0693 (p=1.687e-01).

analyses.code: OLS y ~ feature_063 + feature_111 + feature_063 * feature_111
analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_063 x feature_111: coef=0.0118 (p=7.276e-01).

analyses.code: OLS y ~ feature_063 + feature_040 + feature_063 * feature_040
analyses.result_summary: Interaction feature_063 x feature_040: coef=-0.0463 (p=2.525e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_042 and feature_111 have a positive multiplicative interaction on pfs_months: their joint presence raises pfs_months more than the sum of individual main effects.
feature_015 and feature_111 have a negative multiplicative interaction on pfs_months: feature_015 attenuates the favorable effect of feature_111.
feature_015 and feature_039 have a negative multiplicative interaction on pfs_months.
feature_015 and feature_042 have a negative multiplicative interaction on pfs_months: feature_015 negates the favorable effect of feature_042.
feature_042 and feature_039 have a positive multiplicative interaction on pfs_months.
feature_034 has a positive multiplicative interaction with feature_111 and with feature_042 on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_042 x feature_111 interaction: coef=1.594 months (p=9.31e-229); main effects feature_042=-0.017, feature_111=0.011.
feature_015 x feature_111 interaction: coef=-0.800 months (p=9.90e-57); main effects feature_015=-0.000, feature_111=0.845.
feature_015 x feature_039 interaction: coef=-0.557 months (p=1.04e-30); main effects feature_015=-0.202, feature_039=0.554.
feature_015 x feature_042 interaction: coef=-1.623 months (p=4.00e-255); main effects feature_015=0.008, feature_042=1.659.
feature_042 x feature_039 interaction: coef=1.093 months (p=2.60e-117); main effects feature_042=0.399, feature_039=-0.020.
feature_034 x feature_111 interaction: coef=0.226 months (p=6.62e-06); main effects feature_034=-0.045, feature_111=0.484.
feature_034 x feature_042 interaction: coef=0.419 months (p=9.33e-19); main effects feature_034=-0.028, feature_042=0.943.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within feature_042=1 patients, those with feature_015=1 have lower pfs_months than those with feature_015=0 (feature_015 negates the feature_042 benefit).
Within feature_042=0 patients, feature_015 status has no effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_042=1: feature_015=1 mean PFS=4.352, feature_015=0 mean PFS=5.966; diff=-1.615 months, p=0.00e+00.
Within feature_042=0: feature_015=1 mean PFS=4.316, feature_015=0 mean PFS=4.307; diff=0.008 months, p=7.35e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within feature_111=0 patients, feature_042 has no effect on pfs_months.
Within feature_111=1 patients, feature_042=1 patients have substantially higher pfs_months than feature_042=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_111=0 (n=15114): feature_042 effect on PFS = -0.017 months (p=6.27e-01).
Within feature_111=1 (n=34886): feature_042 effect on PFS = 1.577 months (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the saturated 2x2x2 model of feature_042 x feature_111 x feature_039, the three-way interaction term is positive (joint presence of all three further increases pfs_months beyond pairwise predictions).
Mean pfs_months is highest in the cell feature_042=1 & feature_111=1 & feature_039=1.

analyses.code: OLS y ~ f042 + f111 + f039 + all 2-way + 3-way interactions
analyses.result_summary: Three-way interaction f042xf111xf039 coef=0.126 (p=3.601e-01); much smaller than two-way f042xf111.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within the responder cohort (feature_042=1 AND feature_111=1 AND feature_015=0), feature_034=1 patients have higher pfs_months than feature_034=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Within responder cohort (n=8034): feature_034=1 mean PFS=7.177 (n=3019); feature_034=0 mean PFS=6.381 (n=5015); diff=0.796, p=4.39e-26.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_080's effect on pfs_months is monotonic and approximately linear, with a small positive curvature (linear-quadratic model has a significant positive squared term).

analyses.result_summary: feature_080^2 coef=0.000604 (p=6.24e-25); decile means rise smoothly from 1.70 (decile 1) to 7.84 (decile 10).

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_019 (continuous) retains a positive effect on pfs_months after adjusting for the 11 other top features.
feature_067 (continuous) retains a negative effect on pfs_months after adjusting for the 11 other top features.
feature_101 (continuous) retains a negative effect on pfs_months after adjusting for the 11 other top features.

analyses.result_summary: feature_019 adjusted coef = 0.47616 per unit (p=0.00e+00).
feature_067 adjusted coef = -0.07681 per unit (p=0.00e+00).
feature_101 adjusted coef = -0.01891 per unit (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the 2x2 table of feature_042 x feature_111, the cell (1,1) has substantially higher mean pfs_months than the other three cells, which are nearly identical.
feature_056 has a negative effect on pfs_months at every quartile of feature_080, but the absolute decrement grows with feature_080.

analyses.result_summary: Q1 (lowest f80) f056=1 minus f056=0: -1.43; Q4 (highest): -1.61; interaction coef = -0.0112 (p=3.13e-12).

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_039's protective effect on pfs_months is abolished by feature_015=1 (strong negative feature_015 x feature_039 interaction).

analyses.result_summary: feature_015 x feature_039 interaction: coef=-0.557 (p=1.04e-30); cell means (f015,f039): (0,0)=4.53, (0,1)=5.09, (1,0)=4.33, (1,1)=4.33 - feature_015=1 abolishes feature_039's protective effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within each feature_063 stratum, white patients have shorter pfs_months than non-white patients (a racial disparity may surface inside disease-stratified subgroups even though the global comparison was null).

analyses.result_summary: feature_063=0: mean PFS by race asian=5.725; black=5.651; hispanic=5.615; other=5.880; white=5.628; ANOVA F=1.413 p=0.227.
feature_063=1: mean PFS by race asian=4.426; black=4.500; hispanic=4.480; other=4.445; white=4.427; ANOVA F=0.858 p=0.488.
feature_063=2: mean PFS by race asian=3.334; black=3.236; hispanic=3.330; other=3.155; white=3.288; ANOVA F=0.372 p=0.829.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within each feature_063 stratum, uninsured/medicaid patients have shorter pfs_months than private-insured patients.

analyses.result_summary: feature_063=0: mean PFS by insurance medicaid=5.655; medicare=5.637; private=5.639; uninsured=5.626; ANOVA F=0.047 p=0.986.
feature_063=1: mean PFS by insurance medicaid=4.440; medicare=4.461; private=4.426; uninsured=4.469; ANOVA F=0.428 p=0.733.
feature_063=2: mean PFS by insurance medicaid=3.364; medicare=3.218; private=3.319; uninsured=3.448; ANOVA F=1.966 p=0.117.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each of the 5-level ordinals (feature_021, feature_024, feature_127, feature_001, feature_073) retains an independent association with pfs_months once the dominant prognostic features are adjusted for.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ordinal coef for feature_021 = 0.0008, p=0.851.
Adjusted ordinal coef for feature_024 = 0.0022, p=0.636.
Adjusted ordinal coef for feature_127 = 0.0052, p=0.256.
Adjusted ordinal coef for feature_001 = -0.0078, p=0.093.
Adjusted ordinal coef for feature_073 = -0.0067, p=0.158.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_080 and feature_019 have a small positive multiplicative interaction on pfs_months.
feature_080 has additional non-zero multiplicative interactions with feature_067 and feature_101.
feature_019 and feature_067 have a non-zero multiplicative interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_080 x feature_019 interaction coef=0.00500 (p=1.55e-03).
feature_080 x feature_067 interaction coef=-0.00025 (p=2.20e-01).
feature_080 x feature_101 interaction coef=-0.00005 (p=4.40e-01).
feature_019 x feature_067 interaction coef=0.00802 (p=1.57e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adding the key two-way interactions (f042xf111, f015xf042, f015xf111, f042xf039, f080xf056) to a 12-feature OLS model produces a meaningfully higher R^2 than the main-effects-only model.

analyses.code: compare R^2 of OLS with vs without the 5 interaction terms
analyses.result_summary: R^2 main-effects (12 vars) = 0.7919; R^2 with 5 key interactions = 0.8389; deltaR^2 = 0.0470.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The phenotype defined by feature_042=1 AND feature_111=1 AND feature_015=0 is a 'responder phenotype' with substantially higher pfs_months than the rest of the cohort.

analyses.code: resp = df.query('feature_042==1 & feature_111==1 & feature_015==0'); ttest vs rest
analyses.result_summary: Responder cohort (n=8034, 16.1%) mean PFS=6.680; non-responders (n=41966) mean PFS=4.312; diff=2.368 months, p=0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for the 12 dominant features, additional binary candidates (feature_017, feature_037, feature_093, feature_126) have small but non-zero adverse effects on pfs_months.
After adjustment, feature_034, feature_068, feature_028, feature_020 have no detectable effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coef for feature_017 = -0.0683, p=3.429e-02.
Adjusted coef for feature_037 = -0.0260, p=1.299e-02.
Adjusted coef for feature_093 = -0.0894, p=1.642e-02.
Adjusted coef for feature_126 = -0.1759, p=9.207e-03.
Adjusted coef for feature_034 = 0.0017, p=8.793e-01.
Adjusted coef for feature_068 = -0.0088, p=3.962e-01.
Adjusted coef for feature_028 = -0.0001, p=9.920e-01.
Adjusted coef for feature_020 = -0.0174, p=8.778e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A relatively small set of features - feature_080 plus feature_063 plus ~10 binary/continuous markers and 5 key two-way interactions - explains the great majority of variance in pfs_months in this cohort.

analyses.code: compare R^2 of trimmed model to full 127-feature model
analyses.result_summary: Trimmed 12-feature + 5-interaction OLS achieves R^2=0.8389 (N=50000); full 127-feature OLS achieves R^2=0.7927; trimmed model captures essentially all detectable signal.
